transcript:
CALLER: Haan hello, main apni maa ke liye appointment lena chahta hoon. Unhe sugar ki problem hai — diabetes specialist chahiye.
AGENT: Bilkul. Aapki maa ka naam kya hai aur unki umar kitni hai?
CALLER: Sunanda Kulkarni. 63 saal ki hain.
AGENT: Theek hai. Hamare endocrinologist Dr. Priti Joshi available hain — kal dopahar 2 baje ka slot khali hai, ya phir shukravaar subah 10 baje. Kaunsa better rahega?
CALLER: Kal ka, kal 2 baje.
AGENT: Perfect. Unka registered number kya hai?
CALLER: 9900112233.
AGENT: Done! Mrs. Sunanda Kulkarni ka appointment Dr. Priti Joshi ke saath kal 2 baje confirm ho gaya. Pichle reports aur medicines ki list saath leke aayein. SMS confirmation aayegi thodi der mein.
CALLER: Bahut shukriya bhai.
AGENT: Koi baat nahin! Maa ji ka khayal rakhna.
